title: Els Jelipins: Magical Wines from Catalunya
summary:
I’m always telling myself I need to drink more of these wines. They’re made in tiny production numbers and don’t hang around very long at the distributor, so I only manage to hit the sweet spot intersection of wine release and budget availability every couple years. When that happens, I grab what I can, which […]

title: Blackjack! Twenty-One Platinum Winners from the 2026 Winemaker Challenge
summary:
Commercial winemaking is a multi-faceted job. First and foremost, good winemakers are scientists. Most endure extensive academic training, and whether get that training as university students or through apprenticeship, the result is a person that can analyze wine quickly with a glance, a whiff and a sip. This ability makes a winemaker a particularly tough […]
